title: All Spiders - Crabs & Scorpions, by Mickey Joe
description: Better Spiders Revamped! Crabs on beaches, scorpions in deserts. Scary realistic spiders in Minecraft
body:
Requires OptiFine

RESOURCE PACK FEATURES:

Creepy revamped spider! With realistic details
Two random extra color variants for spiders!
A snowy texture for spiders in snowy biomes (a reference to Minecraft Story Mode)
Spiders deep underground have glowing eyes on their legs (also as seen in McSM)
Scorpion spider variants in deserts!
They sting! And come in two texture variants
Crabs on beaches!
They walk sideways, and have color variants for snowy biomes, and mangrove swamps (referencing the 2023 Mob Vote

Get my full resource pack with all my custom models: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default/](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default/)

I recorded me making these models! Check out my pixel art tutorials on YouTube:
